roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/STWPX/X: PROPOSED TERMS FOR 6 MONTH INFORMAL DIVERSION:/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO STAY EMPLOYED FOR THE DURATION OF DIVERSION & TO PROVIDE PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT, IF DEFENDANT CANNOT STAY EMPLOYED, DEFENDANT MUST COMPLETE 15 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE, IF DEFENDANT CANNOT STAY EMPLOYED FOR THE FULL DURATION OF DIVERSION, COMMUNITY SERVICE HOURS WILL BE PRORATED/CTORD: DEFENDANT NOT TO PICK UP NEW ARRESTS LEADING TO NEWCHARGES/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH PREVIOUSLY ISSUED STAY AWAY ORDER(S)/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT BY 07-14-22 BEFORE NEXTCALLING OF THE CASE/X: END DATE OF 6 MONTH INFORMAL DIVERSION: 12-06-22,//CONTD: STATUS REPORT/DOP/CONTD: TO SET SENTENCE OR DISMISSAL/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/X: CHLOE AMARILLA APPEARS UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF KELSY RYBURN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 06-17-22 (60)/SA2:LARKIN & EDDY/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 05-23-22/DOP//CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 06-06-22/DOP/TE: 90 MINS/
/CAL: PREHEARIUNG CONFERENCE/NEGRPT/INTC/X: FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/
